response.justification: The candidate is a strong, versatile full-stack engineer, but their profile does not match this role's core requirements. Their C++ experience is limited to one early-career position (NI LabWindows/CVI components) and a thesis project, far short of the mandatory 5–10 years of hands-on Windows C++ development. They lack SQL Server/Oracle depth (MySQL/MongoDB instead) and have no fixed-income or capital-markets domain exposure — the closest is a retail investment platform built in Node.js/TypeScript. The mismatch on both mandatory technical skills and domain expertise makes this a poor fit despite solid engineering fundamentals.
strengths: Broad, senior-level engineering experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems
Strong software craftsmanship practices: TDD, CI/CD, pairing, trunk-based development
Prior low-latency, high-throughput systems work (millions of requests/sec) showing performance-engineering aptitude
concerns: C++ experience is dated and brief — one early role plus a thesis, not the required 5–10 years
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; database background is MySQL/MongoDB
No fixed-income, capital-markets, or investment-banking domain experience

key_factors.factor: Missing capital markets / fixed income domain knowledge
Strong general engineering and testing fundamentals
